title: Mirror subitems from another board
excerpt:
Description

posts.author: Bricruz (Brithany Cruz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I want to add a column to a board and have it mirroring subitems from another board.

What are you trying to achieve

Have my own data base for my team members (on one board), then share certain subitems onto another board.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Bricruz ,

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

It allows you to mirror subitems from one board to subitems or even as an item to another board. It keep changes synced including column values, updates+replies and files too!

What You Can Do -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

151920×960 253 KB

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for any questions or book a meeting with us directly here

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Bricruz, @Davidschenkler shared a great tip for connecting subitems to other subitems. This example shows how to link subitems within the same board, but the same steps work across different boards too - just remember to add the column at the subitem level on the other board as well.
Here’s the link to the solution: Connecting Subitems to Other Subitems – Secret Unlocked! - Platform discussions / Special workflows & use cases - monday Community Forum

Hope this helps!
